CustomField.description: Checks whether the appropriate fields have been completed in the "Application Workflow" section.
CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(Date_Supporting_Docs_Received__c), "- Add Date Supporting Documents Received" & BR(), "")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Checks whether the appropriate fields have been completed in the "Application Workflow" section.
CustomField.label: Data Check
